# kSecImportItemIdentity

**Global Variable**

Identity object.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecImportItemIdentity: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type `SecIdentityRef` and represents one identity contained in the PKCS #12 blob.
title: kSecImportItemIdentity
